So overall I rate this game a 10/10. It’s super entertaining and really fun. Once I heard about this game I knew I HAD to download it. I like the graphics and I love the horror mode. One goal I want is to because admin for this game.
So it’s currently downloading I know I’ll make another one but I gotta say nice work

The baked lighting looks really good, the horror is awesome, and there’s much more you can do in the game. the moderators are also active, nice and listening. there’s not one time where you don’t see one chatting in the discord. overall W game.
